reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, si pasas por ahí excelente patys y lomos..

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, if you pass by they have excellent patties and steak sandwiches.

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar, pero prefiero la ypf que está cruzando la ruta

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, but I prefer the YPF gas station across the road
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNk5QZ0t3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio en general. Paramos a cargar combustibles y desayunar y es un lugar excelente.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service overall. We stopped to refuel and have breakfast, and it's an excellent place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBeEtDSEZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Como toda YPF servicio en general bien !! Buena atención del personal

(Translated by Google)
Like all YPF services, generally good! Good customer service from the staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBekxDeGhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, muy completo market y buena limpieza de sanitarios

(Translated by Google)
Good service, very well-stocked market, and clean restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncWFfb2xRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El minimarket no es 24 horas.

(Translated by Google)
The minimarket is not open 24 hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnanNfNmt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar posee un shop bastante completo aunque no esta abierto las 24hs. Se puede cargar agua caliente, baños limpios y lugar para estacionar. Muy buena atención y personal muy amable.

(Translated by Google)
The place has a fairly well-stocked shop, although it's not open 24 hours. You can get hot water, the restrooms are clean, and there's parking. The service is excellent and the staff is very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRcXA2Y09nEAE

reviews.comment:
Un poco lenta la carga de combustible, full y con comedor.

(Translated by Google)
Fueling was a bit slow, even though it was full and had a dining area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNUozd0RnEAE
